title: sphinctanthus acutilobus
intro: Sphinctanthus acutilobus, also known as the "sharp-beaked sphinx flower," is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The health benefits of Sphinctanthus acutilobus are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
